REMARK: PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED VIA MAIL.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-02-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-02-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MARINA GLAZMAN IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANTS UNCUBATEME CORP., AND ALICE ZHANG WERE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: COURT'S CALENDAR CONDITION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-21-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-21-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MARINA GLAZMAN IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT INCUBATEME CORP., (ALICE ZHANG) IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ALICE ZHANG FILED BY DEFENDANT INCUBATEME CORP.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLAZMAN, MARINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INCUBATEME CORP. ZHANG, ALICE $3,150.00 PRINCIPAL, $330.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,480.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-21-2025 - JUDGMENT.
